176498.description: Nerin Norhelm formed admiration toward Wren Jaspmarsh after remembering "Norhelm Household was founded". Intensity 0.74; valence 0.74.

176499.headline: Norhelm Household House Lot was claimed.
176499.description: Nerin Norhelm claimed home in Marara. Its recorded value was 30.5.
